enable_confidence_steer_slew_limit.description: when enabled, limit published steering rate when reference spatial extent ahead of ego is short (soft hold on curves during planner hesitation)

reference_confidence_L_ahead_min.description: spatial arc length [m] below which reference curvature is treated as low-confidence

reference_confidence_L_ahead_ref.description: spatial arc length [m] at or above which reference is fully trusted and slew limiting is disabled

steer_slew_rate_min_rad_s.description: steering rate limit [rad/s] at zero reference confidence; allowed per-cycle steer change blends linearly from min_rate*period (conf=0) to full MPC delta (conf=1)
